needs.summary: Fetch a single business profile by id for the header and Profile card: identity, plan, test flag, masked owner phone, join date, staff seat usage, subscription status, next renewal.
needs.filters/actions: lookup by business id (query param ?id=); ownerPhone must be masked or maskable for display

needs.summary: Fetch the business's BVUM (business value under management) and its effective plan ceiling, including enterprise banding state, so the meter and over-ceiling warning render.
needs.filters/actions: effective ceiling = plan ceiling, or enterprise base + bands x bandCeiling; UI derives over-ceiling state from bvum/ceiling ratio

needs.summary: Fetch current-cycle credit usage broken down by spend type (reminder sends at 5 cr, voice parses at 1 cr, AI insights at 4 cr) plus the plan's monthly grant, any admin-granted bonus credits, and the enterprise fair-use reference.
needs.filters/actions: scoped to the business and the current billing cycle; per-unit credit costs (5/1/4) are contract constants that should come from the backend, not be hardcoded in the UI

needs.summary: Fetch top-up bundle purchases for the current month and the hard monthly bundle cap so the bundle meter and at-cap notice render.
needs.filters/actions: count of bundle purchases scoped to business + current calendar month; cap is a global config value (fixture: 2)

needs.summary: Fetch the most recent debts for the business for the Debts table: customer name, amount, status, created date.
needs.filters/actions: filter by businessId, ordered newest first, limited to a recent window (fixture shows 4-8 rows); status domain: open, part-paid, overdue, paid

needs.summary: Fetch the plan catalog (5-tier ladder) for the Force plan select and for labels/ceilings/grants shown across the screen; currently imported as fixture constants planMeta/planOrder.
needs.filters/actions: full ordered catalog: starter, market, business, wholesale, enterprise; enterprise grant is null (fair use)

needs.summary: Mark or unmark the business as a test account (toggle).
needs.filters/actions: toggle test flag on a business; every write recorded to admin_audit_log per conventions

needs.summary: Grant a positive integer number of bonus credits to the business (form defaults to 250; client validates integer > 0).
needs.filters/actions: additive credit grant on top of the plan grant; audit-logged; conventions place credit grants under test-account tooling but also allow superadmin on non-test businesses

needs.summary: Force the business onto a specific plan, overriding billing until the next renewal; ceiling and grant follow the forced plan immediately.
needs.filters/actions: set plan to one of the 5 tiers; allowed on non-test businesses as the sales provisioning path; audit-logged

needs.summary: Increment or decrement the enterprise extra-band count (floor 0), which raises/lowers the BVUM ceiling and monthly price per the banding config.
needs.filters/actions: only meaningful when plan is enterprise; band count >= 0; audit-logged; allowed on non-test businesses (enterprise ceiling provisioning)

needs.summary: Reset a test business: clear all debts, zero credit spend, and remove bonus credits. Gated behind the test flag; the UI disables it unless isTest is true and the backend must refuse for non-test businesses.
needs.filters/actions: destructive hard reset allowed ONLY when the test flag is set (server-side enforcement per conventions); audit-logged

needs.summary: Fetch the admin action log entries targeting this business (action, acting admin, timestamp) for the Action log panel; currently a session-local list with a hardcoded admin name.
needs.filters/actions: filter audit log by target business id, newest first; conventions already mandate admin_audit_log writes, this screen needs the read side
